name: context-gc
description: Local-first, reversible task-context checkpoints for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Protect important goals, constraints, decisions, and evidence around Codex compaction with bounded context injection, local checkpoints, selective rehydration, restore, and auditable receipts.
defaultPrompt: Checkpoint this Codex task before compaction.
Show the current context risk and protected invariants.
Restore a checkpoint and rehydrate only the evidence I need.
